scripts.dev:backend: bun run cleanup:port && npm --prefix "../../ElevateX/server" run dev
scripts.dev:all: bun run cleanup:port && concurrently -n backend,mobile -c yellow,cyan "npm --prefix '../../ElevateX/server' run dev" "bun run dev:mobile"
scripts.dev:android: bun run cleanup:port && sh -c 'npm --prefix "../../ElevateX/server" run dev & BACKEND_PID=$!; trap "kill -9 $BACKEND_PID" EXIT INT TERM; bun run --cwd apps/mobile android'
